problem_text_cn: 1447 音叉振动频率与对称双臂质量关系的研究（第3届亚洲物理奥林匹克竞赛力学实验试题）。[目的] 研究1个音叉的振动频率如何随附在音叉双臂一定位置上相同物块的质量而变化，并由此测定1对附在音叉上的物块X的未知质量。[可供仪器和用具] (1) 带有数字显示频率的频闪仪；(2) 小型手电筒；(3) 音叉，每个臂上对称地载有31.6 g印有数字和线条的物块，物块的质心与P点重合（P点很清楚地标注在每个臂上，但被这个物块遮盖住）；(4) 2个带有可拆卸手柄的夹子，手柄只在需要打开夹子时使用，实验时卸下；(5) 1对相同未知质量的物块；(6) 具有下列已知质量的物块（成对）：5 g、10 g、15 g、20 g、25 g的物块；(7) 标准作图图纸5张。
problem_text_en: 1447 Study on the relationship between the vibration frequency of a tuning fork and the mass of symmetric double arms (3rd Asian Physics Olympiad Mechanics Experiment). [Purpose] Study how the vibration frequency of a tuning fork changes with the mass of the same object attached to a certain position on the double arms of the tuning fork, and thus determine the unknown mass of a pair of objects X attached to the tuning fork. [Available instruments and tools] (1) Stroboscope with digital display frequency; (2) Small flashlight; (3) Tuning fork, each arm symmetrically carries a 31.6 g object printed with numbers and lines, the center of mass of the object coincides with point P (point P is clearly marked on each arm, but covered by this object); (4) 2 clips with detachable handles, handles are only used when opening clips, removed during experiment; (5) 1 pair of objects with the same unknown mass; (6) Objects with the following known masses (in pairs): 5 g, 10 g, 15 g, 20 g, 25 g; (7) 5 standard drawing papers.
img_cn: 图1447_1：复频测量f-q/p数据及关系图
图1447_2：亚频测量f-q/p数据及关系图
图1447_3：T²-m关系数据及线性拟合结果
图1447_5：音叉振动频率与质量关系实验装置示意图
img_en: Fig. 1447_1: f-q/p data and relationship graph for overtone measurement
Fig. 1447_2: f-q/p data and relationship graph for subharmonic measurement
Fig. 1447_3: T²-m relationship data and linear fitting results
Fig. 1447_5: Schematic diagram of experimental device for relationship between tuning fork vibration frequency and mass
problem_solution_cn: 【核心思路】音叉振动周期满足$T^2 = A(m + B)$（$A$、$B$为常数，$m$为加载物块质量）。用频闪仪测音叉基频：先测复频（闪烁频率高于基频），再测亚频（闪烁频率低于基频），确定基频$f_0$；然后依次加载已知质量物块（5 g、10 g、15 g、20 g、25 g），测对应频率$f$，作$T^2-m$图，拟合得$A = 5.85 \times 10^{-6}\ \mathrm{s^2/g}$，$B = 9.85\ \mathrm{g}$；最后加载未知物块，测$f = 85.6\ \mathrm{Hz}$，$T^2 = 13.6 \times 10^{-4}\ \mathrm{s^2}$，代入$T^2 = 5.85 \times 10^{-6}(m + 9.85)$，得未知物块质量$m_x = 13.4\ \mathrm{g}$。
problem_solution_en: 【Core Idea】The vibration period of the tuning fork satisfies $T^2 = A(m + B)$ ($A$, $B$ are constants, $m$ is the mass of the loaded object). Use a stroboscope to measure the fundamental frequency of the tuning fork: first measure overtones (flashing frequency higher than fundamental frequency), then measure subharmonics (flashing frequency lower than fundamental frequency), determine fundamental frequency $f_0$; then load objects with known masses (5 g, 10 g, 15 g, 20 g, 25 g) in turn, measure corresponding frequencies $f$, plot $T^2-m$ graph, fit to get $A = 5.85 \times 10^{-6}\ \mathrm{s^2/g}$, $B = 9.85\ \mathrm{g}$; finally load unknown object, measure $f = 85.6\ \mathrm{Hz}$, $T^2 = 13.6 \times 10^{-4}\ \mathrm{s^2}$, substitute into $T^2 = 5.85 \times 10^{-6}(m + 9.85)$, get unknown object mass $m_x = 13.4\ \mathrm{g}$.
problem_answer: 未知物块质量：$\boldsymbol{13.4\ \mathrm{g}}$；测量关键：频闪仪测基频，线性拟合求$A$、$B$，代入求未知质量；注意：复频/亚频需正确区分，避免将2倍频当作基频。
